query:

[Assistant] Wave 2 — `co_access_promotion_tick`.
[tool: Bash(git add product/features/crt-034/agents/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'

[Assistant] The agents committed their own changes directly — Wave 1 is already in the log. Also picking up the agent reports.

da9f209 impl(store_constants): add EDGE_SOURCE_CO_ACCESS and CO_ACCESS_GRAPH_MIN_COUNT constants (#456)
ea7ec74 pseudocode: crt-034 component design + test plans (#456)
7d0a39c design: crt-034 design revie]

entries.title: Avoid multi-filter git show pipelines — use git show SHA:path or git diff instead
ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
SM must commit all in-flight working tree diffs before invoking gate validators
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
